nodes.label: 澳洲日常服务表达
nodes.description: 咖啡店、超市、柜台等服务场景的常用表达归纳。重点不是复刻对话，而是按交际意图复习可复用句型。

nodes.label: 开场寒暄
nodes.description:
How ya going?
How's it going?
Yeah, not too bad. Yourself?
Good thanks.
说明：澳洲服务场景常用轻松寒暄。回答“你呢”不要说 are you，直接用 Yourself? / How about you?。

nodes.label: 提出请求
nodes.description:
Can I get a medium oat latte, please?
I'd like to return this item.
I'd like to ask about your membership plans.
I'm here for the inspection.
I'd like to open a bank account.
说明：日常请求常用 Can I get... / I'd like to...，不要逐字翻译“我想要了解”。

nodes.label: 确认选项
nodes.description:
For here or takeaway?
Takeaway, please.
Any sugar?
No thanks.
Would you like a savings account or a transaction account?
Just a transaction account for now.
说明：澳洲说 takeaway，不说 take out；for now 表示“暂时先这样”。

nodes.label: 付款和金额
nodes.description:
That'll be six fifty.
Can I pay by card?
Card okay?
Your debit card will be sent to your address.
within a few business days
说明：$6.50 读作 six fifty；business days 是银行、物流、行政场景高频表达。

nodes.label: 退货、换货和商品问题
nodes.description:
I'd like to return this item.
What seems to be the problem?
I realised it was faulty.
Do you have a receipt?
We can give you a refund or exchange it for a new one.
I'll take a replacement, please.
说明：退货说 return this item，不说 refund this good；faulty 是澳洲退货场景高频词。

nodes.label: 礼貌回应
nodes.description:
No worries.
Sure, here you go.
Yep, here it is.
Just give me a moment.
Just a sec.
说明：No worries 在澳洲非常高频，可表示“没问题 / 不客气 / 可以”。

nodes.label: 澳洲生活办理表达
nodes.description: 租房、银行开户、健身房咨询等生活落地场景的表达归纳。

nodes.label: 说明来意
nodes.description:
I'm here for the inspection.
I'd like to open a bank account.
I'd like to ask about your membership plans.
I'm looking to open an account.
说明：这类场景先直接说明目的，不需要复杂铺垫。

nodes.label: 确认预约和地址
nodes.description:
Have you booked an inspection?
I booked the 2 pm inspection.
Do you currently have an Australian address?
I recently rented a place.
I just moved to this area.
说明：看房用 inspection；住处口语里常说 place。

nodes.label: 询问房型、家具和费用包含
nodes.description:
This is a two-bedroom apartment.
Most of the furniture is included.
Are utilities included in the rent?
Is water and internet included in the rent?
You'll need to set up your own internet.
说明：furniture 不可数；生活场景网络说 internet，不说 network。

nodes.label: 证件材料和账户类型
nodes.description:
I'll also need your passport and visa.
Is an electronic visa okay?
Would you like a savings account or a transaction account?
Just a transaction account for now.
说明：savings account 要带 s；transaction account 是澳洲常见日常消费账户。

nodes.label: 会员方案和体验
nodes.description:
We offer both monthly and yearly memberships.
Do you offer a free trial?
We offer a free trial pass.
What time does the gym usually close?
I'll give it a try today.
month-to-month membership
说明：健身房说 membership，不说 VIP plans；体验用 give it a try 很自然。

nodes.label: 询问下一步
nodes.description:
What should I do next?
What's the next step?
You'll need to submit an application.
We'll contact you after that.
说明：submit an application 是租房、银行、行政申请中的标准表达。

nodes.label: 澳洲办公室闲聊表达
nodes.description: 同事之间轻量聊天时使用的澳洲口语归纳。

nodes.label: 约午饭和咖啡
nodes.description:
Any lunch plans today?
What are you having for lunch today?
I might just grab something quick.
A new Thai place just opened downstairs.
Keen to try it?
I also wanna grab a coffee while we're there.
说明：grab lunch / grab a coffee / keen to... 很澳洲。

nodes.label: 表达饮食偏好
nodes.description:
I'm not really into spicy food.
I can't really handle spicy food.
They've got non-spicy options too.
They also have mild dishes.
说明：“不太能吃辣”不要说 I cannot eat too spicy。

nodes.label: 聊忙碌和加班
nodes.description:
Have you been working overtime lately?
We've been pretty flat out lately.
The project's been pretty hectic lately.
I've been pretty slammed this week.
Things have been pretty busy lately.
说明：flat out / slammed / hectic 都可表示忙；overtime 不加连字符。

nodes.label: 轻量回应和自然衔接
nodes.description:
Sounds good.
No worries.
Yeah, a bit.
Might grab a coffee as well.
Probably just gonna grab something nearby.
说明：办公室闲聊不需要太完整书面，多用短句更自然。

nodes.label: 工程日常协作表达
nodes.description: 站会、需求确认、风险说明、依赖同步、时间线影响等工程协作表达归纳。

nodes.label: 询问进度
nodes.description:
Do you think you can finish this feature today?
How's it going?
What did you work on yesterday?
How's everything looking?
Any updates on this?
说明：Do you think you can... 比直接 Can you... 更委婉。

nodes.label: 汇报进度
nodes.description:
I should be able to.
I finished refactoring the login module yesterday.
Overall it's been pretty smooth.
I'll keep working on the fixes today.
I'll add more test coverage today.
说明：work on / keep working on / test coverage 是工程场景高频搭配。

nodes.label: 说明还不确定
nodes.description:
I still need to check a few things with the API.
The user permission logic is still a bit unclear.
I need to clarify that part first.
I'm not 100% sure about the API contract yet.
说明：不要说 confirm an API；更自然是 check the API details / clarify the requirement。

nodes.label: 描述问题
nodes.description:
We ran into some issues.
I found a few issues in the legacy code.
The legacy system uses inconsistent data formats.
There are a few edge cases we haven't covered yet.
This part is still a bit unclear.
说明：描述问题时用 ran into issues / found issues / inconsistent / edge cases，比直译 have problems 更自然。

nodes.label: 说明依赖或阻塞
nodes.description:
There's a dependency that hasn't been confirmed.
We're waiting on the backend team.
This depends on the API changes.
The backend contract hasn't been finalised yet.
This might become a blocker.
说明：dependency / blocker / waiting on... 是团队协作高频表达。

nodes.label: 说明影响时间线
nodes.description:
This might impact the timeline.
This could affect this week's release.
It might push the release back.
It could take longer than expected.
We may need to adjust the timeline.
说明：impact the timeline / affect the release / push back 是说明延期风险的自然表达。

nodes.label: 同步确认
nodes.description:
Maybe sync with the PM this afternoon.
Should we sync with the backend team first?
I'll confirm it with the PM.
I'll continue once I've clarified that part.
Might be worth confirming with the backend side first.
说明：sync with 是职场高频；Might be worth... 是委婉建议。

nodes.label: Code Review 与架构表达
nodes.description: PR 反馈、代码质量、职责边界、重构、抽象和可维护性讨论的表达归纳。

nodes.label: 给 Code Review 反馈
nodes.description:
I just had a look at your PR.
I went through your PR.
Overall it looks good.
There are still a few areas we could improve.
A couple of things could be cleaned up.
说明：areas we could improve / clean up 比 points could be optimized 更自然。

nodes.label: 询问有什么需要修改
nodes.description:
Anything I should fix?
Any changes needed?
Anything I need to update?
Is there anything you'd like me to change?
说明：不要说 is there anything need to change。

nodes.label: 提出技术担心
nodes.description:
There's one thing I'm a bit concerned about.
I have a small concern around this part.
This might be a performance issue.
This could cause problems later.
说明：I'm a bit concerned about... 是职场里比较委婉的表达。

nodes.label: 说明职责或逻辑太多
nodes.description:
This service has too many responsibilities.
This service is handling too much logic.
There seems to be too much business logic in the controller.
This class is doing too much.
The controller is getting a bit too heavy.
说明：business logic 不可数；doing too much 是架构讨论里非常自然的说法。

nodes.label: 建议拆分或重构
nodes.description:
Should we move it into the service layer?
Should we extract this into a separate service?
We could split this logic up.
Some of the logic could be abstracted further.
I'll clean this part up later.
I'll refactor it a bit further.
说明：move into / extract into / split up / clean up 都是高频重构表达。

nodes.label: 说明可维护性影响
nodes.description:
It could cause maintainability issues later.
It might become harder to maintain later on.
This could make future changes more difficult.
This might introduce technical debt.
说明：maintainability issues / technical debt 是架构讨论高频。

nodes.label: 敏捷与需求变更表达
nodes.description: Sprint planning、估算、风险、需求变更、影响范围和时间线表达归纳。

nodes.label: 估算工作量
nodes.description:
How long do you think this will take?
What's your estimate for this task?
It should take around two days.
I'll update the estimate later.
I'll estimate the effort first.
说明：工作量估算常用 estimate / effort；不要说 workloads。

nodes.label: 说明估算前提
nodes.description:
Assuming there are no API changes, it should take around two days.
As long as the API stays the same, it should be fine.
If the scope doesn't change, we should be okay.
This estimate assumes the backend contract is stable.
说明：Assuming... 是说明估算前提的高频结构。

nodes.label: 说明风险和阻塞点
nodes.description:
Any risks?
Any blockers?
The main risk is the legacy data format.
We might run into issues during testing.
This could become a blocker if the API changes.
说明：blocker 是阻塞点；run into issues 比 cause some issues 更口语自然。

nodes.label: 描述需求变更
nodes.description:
The client just brought up a new requirement.
Is it a minor change, or will it affect the current logic?
They want us to support role-based access control.
The requirement has changed a bit.
The scope is slightly different now.
说明：role-based access control 可简称 RBAC；不要说 pull a new requirement。

nodes.label: 评估影响范围
nodes.description:
We might need to adjust the current data structure.
The frontend team will probably need to make quite a few changes as well.
I'll assess the impact scope first.
We need to understand the affected areas first.
This might impact the existing logic.
说明：impact scope / affected areas 比 influence range 正确。

nodes.label: 询问或说明时间线
nodes.description:
Is there a timeline for this requirement?
Do we have a target release date?
The client wants this done as soon as possible.
Let's put this into the current sprint for now.
We may need to adjust the timeline.
说明：timeline 比 deadline 更适合问计划；for now 表示暂时这样安排。

nodes.label: 常见表达纠错
nodes.description: 根据之前英语训练中反复出现的问题，归纳中式直译、搭配错误、可数性和介词问题。

nodes.label: 词义误用
nodes.description:
otherwise = 否则，不是“另外”。
internet = 生活里的网络，不说 network。
membership = 健身房会员，不说 VIP plans。
release = 产品上线计划，比 deployment 更口语。
transaction account = 澳洲日常消费账户。

nodes.label: 可数和不可数
nodes.description:
business logic 不可数：too much business logic。
furniture 不可数：Most of the furniture is included。
code 不可数：legacy code，不说 old codes。
savings account 固定带 s。
service has 注意第三人称单数。

nodes.label: 动词和介词搭配
nodes.description:
return this item，不说 refund this good。
exchange it for a new one，不说 exchange a new one。
move it into the service layer，不说 separate to。
set up your own internet，不说 apply the network。
check a few things with the API，不说 confirm an API。

nodes.label: 中文直译替换
nodes.description:
How long do you think this will take? 不说 How long can you finish this task。
What are you having for lunch? 不说 What do you plan to eat this noon。
I'm not really into spicy food 不说 I cannot eat too spicy。
impact scope / affected areas 不说 influence range。
That'll be six fifty 不说 six point five。
